sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row(
			"SELECT
				MAX(CASE WHEN cta != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cta,
				MAX(CASE WHEN watermark != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_watermark,
				MAX(CASE WHEN email_collection != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email_collection,
				MAX(CASE WHEN action_bar != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_action_bar,
				MAX(CASE WHEN captions = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_captions,
				MAX(CASE WHEN sticky_scroll = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_sticky_scroll,
				MAX(CASE WHEN save_player_position = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_save_position
			FROM {$presets_table}" // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
		)

get_option(
			self::get_nps_id( $plugin_slug ),
			array(
				'dismiss_count'       => 0,
				'dismiss_permanently' => false,
				'dismiss_step'        => '',
				'dismiss_time'        => '',
				'dismiss_timespan'    => null,
				'first_render_time'   => null,
			)
		)

sinks.expression: printf( __( 'The video files in the %s folder are not currently protected due to your site running on NGINX.', 'presto-player' ), 'presto-player-private' )

wp_remote_get(
			add_query_arg(
				array(
					'woo_sl_action'     => 'activate',
					'licence_key'       => (string) Setting::get( 'license', 'key' ),
					'product_unique_id' => self::PRODUCT_ID,
					'domain'            => self::canonicalDomain(),
				),
				self::apiUrl()
			),
			array( 'timeout' => 15 )
		)
header( 'Expires: ' . gmdate( 'D, d M Y H:i:s', time() + 2592000 ) . ' GMT' )
header( 'Last-Modified: ' . gmdate( 'D, d M Y H:i:s', @filemtime( $this->path ) ) . ' GMT' )

$wpdb->get_row(
			"SELECT
				MAX(CASE WHEN cta != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cta,
				MAX(CASE WHEN watermark != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_watermark,
				MAX(CASE WHEN email_collection != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email_collection,
				MAX(CASE WHEN action_bar != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_action_bar,
				MAX(CASE WHEN captions = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_captions,
				MAX(CASE WHEN sticky_scroll = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_sticky_scroll,
				MAX(CASE WHEN save_player_position = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_save_position
			FROM {$presets_table}" // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
		)
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

sanitizers.expression:
wp_kses_data(
			get_block_wrapper_attributes(
				array(
					'data-wp-on--click'            => 'actions.showPopup',
					'tabindex'                     => '0',
					'data-wp-on--keydown'          => 'actions.handleKeydown',
					'aria-label'                   => __( 'Open Presto Popup dialog', 'presto-player' ),
					'aria-haspopup'                => 'dialog',
					'data-wp-on-document--keydown' => 'callbacks.handleKeydown',
					'data-wp-bind--aria-expanded'  => 'state.overlayEnabled',
				)
			)
		)

wp_kses_post( _x( '

%1$s will auto complete in %2$s seconds

', 'placeholders: 1. Lesson or Topic label, 2. span for counter', 'presto-player' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
					"AND `{$field}` >= %s ", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared -- $field is validated against schema whitelist.
					gmdate( 'Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime( $query['date_query']['after'] ) )
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"AND `{$field}` <= %s ", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared -- $field is validated against schema whitelist.
					gmdate( 'Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime( $query['date_query']['before'] ) )
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$table} WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
				gmdate( 'Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime( '-7 days' ) )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				" AND (
					{$wpdb->posts}.post_type != %s
					OR EXISTS (
						SELECT 1 FROM {$wpdb->postmeta}
						WHERE {$wpdb->postmeta}.post_id = {$wpdb->posts}.ID
						AND {$wpdb->postmeta}.meta_key = %s
						AND {$wpdb->postmeta}.meta_value = %s
					)
				)",
				$this->post_type,
				'presto_player_instant_video_pages_enabled',
				'1'
			)
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Help improve %s by sharing non-sensitive usage data — like PHP version and features used.' ), $args['title'] ) )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( '%2s', esc_url( $args['usage_doc_link'] ), __( 'Learn More.' ) ) )

header( 'Last-Modified: ' . gmdate( 'D, d M Y H:i:s', @filemtime( $this->path ) ) . ' GMT' )

				MAX(CASE WHEN save_player_position = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_save_position
			FROM {$presets_table}" // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
		)
